title: vyos provider
description: Native VyOS HTTP API OpenTofu/Terraform provider. Config-path based (set/delete/showConfig over /configure + /retrieve, API-key auth). Generic vyos_config resource + data source give 100% config-tree coverage; manage-declared-only subset model imports existing config to 0-diff.

phases.title: Core (generic, full coverage)
phases.exit_criteria: Builds, vets, tests; one resource + data source cover all VyOS config paths.

items.feature: VyOS HTTP API transport (multipart form data+key; /configure set/delete with atomic commit; /retrieve showConfig/exists; /config-file save; NotFound classification; insecure TLS)
vyos_config resource (CRUD + ImportState; path-list ForceNew; subtree flattened to set commands; update prunes removed leaves via delete)
Manage-declared-only drift: recursive subset plan modifier (declared keys match device -> 0-diff; never clobbers unmanaged config)
vyos_config data source (read any path via showConfig)

phases.title: Validate against live VyOS
phases.exit_criteria: A lab VyOS node imports to 0-diff through the provider.

items.feature: Provider installable on the Semaphore runner (filesystem_mirror + scoped .terraformrc); tofu init verified
Live import to 0-diff proven against a lab VyOS (import + apply -> tofu plan = No changes)
Acceptance tests (TF_ACC) against a throwaway/lab VyOS

phases.title: net/routers integration
phases.exit_criteria: module emits vyos_config from native NetBox modeling; VyOS managed via Semaphore to 0-diff.

items.feature: required_providers + vyos provider; NetBox-driven interfaces/firewall/nat/service emitted as vyos_config

phases.title: Ergonomics + release
phases.exit_criteria: Optional typed sugar; CI; registry publish.

items.feature: Typed sugar resources (interface, firewall_rule, nat_rule) over the generic core
CI (build/vet/test) + GoReleaser + registry publish + docs gen
